monthly_trade_pulse.scope: EU + selected partners | imports + exports | 60/40 weighting
monthly_trade_pulse.methodology: Monthly balanced bundle. Shows the last 18 months after 3-month moving-average smoothing when live COMEXT extraction succeeds.
monthly_trade_pulse.note: Monthly balanced bundle computed from COMEXT bulk files.

balanced_signal.note: Primary monthly trade pulse from COMEXT bulk files.

exports_signal.note: Exports slice from monthly COMEXT bundle.

imports_signal.note: Imports slice from monthly COMEXT bundle.

customs_monitor.methodology: Live Eurostat dataset tet00013 mapped via JSON-stat payload parser.
customs_monitor.coverage_note: This is a customs proxy signal, not a complete global fuel-cell trade dataset.
customs_monitor.next_step_note: Next step: replace or supplement tet00013 with a verified COMEXT monthly bundle.

ir_headlines.title: Cell Impact AB is a global supplier of advanced flow plates to manufacturers of fuel cells and electrolyzers.
Good corporate governance is about ensuring that Cell Impact is managed sustainably, responsibly and as efficiently as possible.
